payload.answer: No update needed; the new information duplicates an existing memory.
citations: Existing memory: 'Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.'

details: Detected duplicate content with no substantive change in meaning.
Did not create a new memory card to avoid redundant durable storage.
